assets.name: lecture_08_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best readable frame of the initial non-symmetric localized-state sketch in the double-well, before the symmetric and antisymmetric combinations are built.

assets.name: lecture_08_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Clearest centered view of the double-well potential with the symmetrically continued wavefunction and the energy reference E.

assets.name: lecture_08_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Useful board-layout reference for the side-by-side left/right localized-state sketches and shared energy line, despite partial washout.

assets.name: lecture_08_frame_04.png
assets.rationale: Readable shot of the psi_L plus/minus psi_R construction with the split-energy labeling.

assets.name: lecture_08_frame_05.png
assets.rationale: Best readable frame of the time-evolution algebra leading to the condition e^(2 i epsilon t) = -1.
